lines.speaker: Conwenna
lines.text: You do not have all of the required materials and requirements to make anything.

lines.speaker: Conwenna
lines.text: What would you like me to craft for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you tell me about crystal singing?

lines.speaker: Conwenna
lines.text: Of course! We elves learned the art long ago, allowing us to form crystals in any way we would like, using just our voices.

lines.speaker: Conwenna
lines.text: It's allowed us to make weapons, armour and tools using the finest crystals.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow. Is there any way I could do it?

lines.speaker: Conwenna
lines.text: You might be able to with the help of the crystal bowl over there. As long as you've got the right knowledge of what you're trying to craft.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you do it for me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you sing a song for me?

lines.speaker: Conwenna
lines.text: Of course! Would you like me to craft something for you? For some crystal shards, of course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, thank you. I'd just like to hear you sing.
